steps.title: Locate the median
steps.content: In a box plot, the median is the vertical line inside the box. On this plot, that line is just above $7{,}000$ acres.

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The choice closest to the median line is $7{,}067$. The other choices are closer to other parts of the box plot, such as the lower quartile, upper quartile, or maximum. The answer is B.
